comment: Synthetic stage IIB HER2+ early-stage breast cancer, female 51 premenopausal, cT2N1M0 (3.4 cm tumor + 1 axillary LN clinically positive), HER2 IHC 3+, ER 60% / PR 40%. Anchor: TCHP neoadjuvant → KATHERINE T-DM1 if non-pCR (residual ypT+ or ypN+) — captured in KB as IND-BREAST-HER2-POS-EARLY-NEOADJUVANT.followed_by REG-TDM1-ADJUVANT. Engine drift: ALGO-BREAST-1L step 1 HER2-amp-RF True → step 2 free-text 'Stage I-III (early)' resolves False (no disease-scoped RF for early-stage) → IND-BREAST-HER2-POS-MET-1L-THP fires as default. The HER2+ early neoadj indication still surfaces as an alternative track. Anchor preserves intent; KB algo step-2 RF gap is logged for follow-up.
